metadata.title: cron.menu — Scan. Order. Done.
metadata.description: The fastest way for restaurants to serve guests. Scan the QR code on your table, browse the menu, order, and call a waiter.
metadata.keywords: QR menu, restaurant ordering, call waiter, contactless menu, table ordering, restaurant software, QR code menu, digital menu, restaurant dashboard
metadata.ogAlt: cron.menu — the restaurant QR menu for guests that orders and calls a waiter with one tap.

hero.title: Scan. Order. Done.
hero.subtitle: The fastest way for restaurants to serve guests. One scan — your menu on their screen. One tap — a waiter at their table.

scan.title: Scan to view menu
scan.desc: Guests scan a table QR code and see your menu instantly — no app needed.

order.title: Order from the table
order.desc: Guests add items to cart. Orders arrive on your dashboard in real time.

callWaiter.title: Call a waiter
callWaiter.desc: One tap pings the right staff. No more waving from across the room.

global.title: Works in any language
global.desc: Auto-detects guest language. English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Chinese — more on the way.

menu.emptyMenu: Menu coming soon — please ask a waiter.
menu.placeOrderError: We couldn't send your order. Please try again.
menu.callWaiterError: We couldn't send the request. Please try again.

tableUnavailable.title: This table isn't active
tableUnavailable.body: Please ask a staff member for help.

cart.title: Your cart
cart.viewCount: {count, plural, =0 {View cart} one {View cart · # item} other {View cart · # items}}

waiter.title: Call a waiter
waiter.sent: A waiter is on the way

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Live orders and requests from your dining room.

staff.title: Your team
staff.confirmRemove: Remove this member? They'll be signed out of every device.

stats.activeOrders: {count, plural, =0 {No active orders} one {# order} other {# orders}}
stats.openRequests: {count, plural, =0 {No open requests} one {# request} other {# requests}}
stats.tablesActive: {count, plural, =0 {Empty room} one {# table seated} other {# tables seated}}

inbox.emptyHint: New orders and calls appear here in real time.

install.title: Install cron.menu
install.description: Get live notifications when a guest orders or calls a waiter — even when the app is closed.

notifications.title: Turn on push notifications
notifications.description: Get alerted when a new order or waiter call comes in — even with the phone locked.
notifications.blockedDescription: You've blocked notifications for this site. Allow them in your browser settings to receive alerts.

tables.title: Tables
tables.count: {count, plural, =0 {No tables yet} one {# table} other {# tables}}
tables.deleteBody: Hide "{label}" from the dashboard? Its order history is preserved for reports.
tables.emptyBody: Add your first table to generate a QR code guests can scan.
tables.urlHint: Each QR opens your menu at {name} with the guest's language auto-detected. Reprinting isn't needed when you rename a table.

errors.rangeInvalid: From and To must both be numbers.
errors.duplicate_label: That label is already in use.
errors.bulkLimitExceeded: You can only add {limit} tables at a time.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.

confirm.title: Check your email
confirm.body: Click the link in the email to verify your address. This window can stay open — after verifying you'll land straight on your dashboard.

errors.identifierInvalid: Enter a valid email or phone number.
errors.phoneInvalidFormat: That doesn't look like a phone number. Try again with the country code.
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.phone_already_registered: That phone number is already registered.
errors.auth_create_failed: We couldn't create the account. Try again.
errors.auth_user_not_found: We couldn't find that account. Please sign up again.
errors.already_onboarded: This account is already linked to a restaurant.
errors.setup_failed: Account created but setup failed. Contact support.
errors.unauthenticated: Your session has ended. Please sign in again.
errors.forbidden: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
